Action Item: May 11 2026 "Spoke with Colin Funk at (209) 612-7102 and advised that I was returning h...
Description:
May 11 2026 "Spoke with Colin Funk at (209) 612-7102 and advised that I was returning his call. Colin stated that, per the IRS, the ERTC refunds will not be processed because CM E Construction allegedly filed Form 944 instead of Form 941. He stated that the IRS is requesting official documentation confirming that a Form 944 was filed.

Colin advised that he believes this information is inaccurate, as his client filed Form 941 in 2021. He stated that he is unsure whether this issue may have originated when the business was first established and the EIN was obtained, possibly due to an error in failing to indicate that payroll would exceed $1,000.

I advised Colin that I would need to submit a request to determine whether there is anything that can be done on our end regarding this matter."
